name: Inkbox
description: Adds Inkbox messaging tools (email, SMS, voice) to OpenClaw

apiKey.description: Inkbox API key (ApiKey_... format). Create one in the Inkbox Console.

identity.description: Agent identity handle to send from (3–63 lowercase alphanum/dash).

baseUrl.description: Override Inkbox API base URL. Defaults to https://inkbox.ai.

signingKey.description: Webhook HMAC signing secret. Required when inbound webhooks are enabled.

tunnelName.description: Override the Inkbox tunnel name. Defaults to the identity handle so the public URL is stable across restarts.

publicUrl.description: If set, skip the Inkbox tunnel and assume webhooks land at this public URL. Used when OpenClaw is hosted on a publicly reachable host.

vault.description: Vault tool configuration. Vault tools are optional and must be opted into via tools.allow.

keyEnvVar.description: Env var the vault unlock key is read from. Defaults to INKBOX_VAULT_KEY.

allowedRecipients.description: Outbound recipient allowlist. When set, send_email / send_sms / forward_email reject any recipient (to/cc/bcc) not on this list. Phone numbers in E.164, emails as exact addresses.

allowedInboundContactIds.description: Inbound contact-id allowlist. When set, webhook events whose remote contact id is not on this list are dropped (mail/text become no-ops, calls are rejected). Events with no contact resolution are also dropped.
